name: Research Analyst
description: Analyses research depth across the council pipeline: topic coverage, data density, evidence breadth, and synthesis richness. Measures average word count per model, citation integration from evidence skills, and output richness features (tables, references, equations, molecular structures).

provider.organization: Bayer AG — LLM Council Agent Team

skills.name: Topic Coverage Analysis
skills.description: Evaluates the breadth and depth of model responses by measuring total word count, average words per model, and response distribution. Flags low-depth responses (<100 words/model) and celebrates high-depth (>400 words/model).
examples: Assess whether 5 models produced comprehensive enough responses on ATTR-CM treatment

skills.name: Evidence Integration Check
skills.description: Verifies whether external citations from evidence skills (PubMed, ClinicalTrials.gov, FDA, etc.) were retrieved and integrated. Reports source types and skills used. Warns when answers rely purely on model training data.

skills.name: Synthesis Richness Score
skills.description: Measures richness of the chairman's Stage 3 output: presence of markdown tables, inline citation tags, mathematical equations (KaTeX), and SMILES molecular structures. A score of 3+ features indicates rich scientific output.
